# third-party skills

Skills here are **not authored as part of the leanish suite** — they are vendored from external
repositories, kept here for reference and reproducible local install. They carry no `leanish-`
prefix; the suite's own (work-in-progress) skills live in `../wip/`.

| Skill | Source | License |
|---|---|---|
| `grill-me` — one-question-at-a-time grilling of a plan | [mattpocock/skills](https://github.com/mattpocock/skills) | MIT |
| `grill-with-docs` — grill a plan against repo language; capture terminology/ADRs | [mattpocock/skills](https://github.com/mattpocock/skills) | MIT |
| `improve-codebase-architecture` — find architectural "deepening" opportunities | [mattpocock/skills](https://github.com/mattpocock/skills) | MIT |
| `karpathy-guidelines` — LLM coding guardrails (from Andrej Karpathy's observations) | [multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills](https://github.com/multica-ai/andrej-karpathy-skills) | MIT |

Each directory carries its own `LICENSE` (so the notice travels when a skill is installed on its own).
Full attribution, copyright notices, sync provenance, and the MIT license text are consolidated in
**[NOTICES.md](./NOTICES.md)** — keep both accurate when adding or updating a vendored skill.
